description: Pose and rotation rules for placing defined piece rotations inside the 5x5x10 pit.

poseSchema.rotationId: string; must exist for selected piece

rotationCandidateFlow: select next rotationId for the active piece
load that rotation's normalized local cube set
test current pose against extent and pit bounds
future: test collision with locked occupancy
accept only if legal; otherwise keep previous rotation
rotationRules.normalizationRule: after rotation, translate local cubes so min x/y/z is 0

rotationControls.firstOverlayProof: rotation may be selected/tested but active movement remains simple

futureKeys.rotateX: cycle to next orientation around x-like family when available
futureKeys.rotateY: cycle to next orientation around y-like family when available
futureKeys.rotateZ: cycle to next orientation around z-like family when available

rotationRules.rejectionRule: if candidate rotation would place any cube outside the pit or future locked occupancy, reject rotation and preserve current pose

zPolicy.reason: first overlay proves dirty restore/draw without drop physics

futureGameplayPhase.name: falling_piece_with_locked_blocks
legalPose: all world cubes are inside pit bounds
no world cube overlaps locked occupancy
rotation is accepted only if rotated world cubes remain legal
drop is accepted only if next z is legal
landingRule: if next drop pose is illegal because of bottom or locked occupancy, current pose becomes locked
locked cubes merge into static layer

runtimeLoop: restore previous active dirty records from static layer
save current dirty records as previous
